_comment: Input JSON shape for scripts/generate_tsd.py. v1 covers Annex 1 (resident natural persons + board fees). All monetary values are decimals (EUR). Generator computes header c110-c119 and Annex 1 c1200-c1250 roll-ups when not pre-supplied.
_comment_load_mode: P = amend existing in-progress declaration (default; safest for repeated submissions). L = new declaration; cancels any existing in-progress draft for the same period.
_comment_amend_fields: Optional — set only when refiling a previously-accepted return. Codes (c121_ParPohjusKood): VMA/VET/VDV/VVK/TTM/MTR/DAM/DVK/VPV/AML/MUU. See references/tsd-codes.md.
_comment_header_overrides: Optional explicit header values; if present, override the generator's computed roll-ups. Use sparingly (e.g. for amended returns where prior-period adjustments shift c118_KohustKokku).

persons._comment: One row per person — resident natural persons (Annex 1A). Use payments[] to capture all payments to this person in the period; the generator emits one <tsd_L1_A_Vm> per element.

payments._comment_payment: Single payment row. payment_type_code is the c1020_ValiKood lookup (10=salary, 11=vacation, 12=sick, 13=contractor, 21=board fee, 27=fringe benefit, ...). See references/tsd-codes.md.
payments._comment_combined_kp: c1110_Kp = pension (II pillar) + employee unemployment insurance combined. e-MTA reports them as one number.

tax_free_items._comment_tax_free: c1150_TuliKood codes: 610=basic exemption, 620=mandatory pension contribution deducted, 630=employee unemployment deducted. See references/tsd-codes.md.

payments._comment_optional_special_fields: Below fields are optional and rarely needed. Pension-incapacity adjustments and minimum-tax-base nudges only apply for specific edge cases.

_comment_non_resident_persons: Optional. Same shape as 'persons' but for Annex 2 (tsd_L2_0 — non-resident natural persons + non-resident companies). Required per-payment fields: country_of_residence (c2020_RiikKood, ISO-3166-1 alpha-2), payment_type_code (c2030_ValiKood — see references/tsd-codes.md), gross. Optional: a1_certificate_country, social_tax_base, social_tax, unemployment_*, income_tax_base, income_tax_rate (10/22/0 etc.), income_tax. Validation is looser than Annex 1 because tax-treaty rates vary; caller is responsible for the math. Routing: split your persons[] from the ERP into resident → 'persons', non_resident → 'non_resident_persons' based on master_employees.metadata.tax_filing.residency.
_comment_annex_4: Optional. Fringe benefits (Annex 4 / tsd_L4_0). Each key maps to a c4xxx element. Omit the whole block to skip Annex 4. Generator emits only the keys you provide. The caller is responsible for computing tax fields (special_income_tax, social_tax, social_tax_base) — typical formula is special_income_tax = grossed_up_value × 22/78, social_tax = (grossed_up_value + special_income_tax) × 33%. See references/tsd-codes.md.

annex_4._comment_company_vehicle: c4040_Ts — value of company-vehicle non-business use
annex_4._comment_special_income_tax: c4170_TmEj — gross-up income tax on Annex 4 (= taxable × 22/78). Rolls into header c114_TmEj.
annex_4._comment_social_tax: c4180_Sm — social tax on Annex 4 (= (taxable + special_income_tax) × 33%). Rolls into header c115_Sm.

_comment_annex_5: Optional. Gifts/donations/entertainment (Annex 5 / tsd_L5_0). general_gifts (c5000) covers gifts NOT to the listed-charity register. listed_charity_month (c5010) covers § 11(1) recipients. entertainment_month (c5100) covers business entertainment. Tax fields are caller-computed. See references/tsd-codes.md.

annex_5._comment_special_income_tax_payable: c5160_TasTmEj — payable special income tax. Rolls into header c114_TmEj.

_comment_annex_7: Optional. Dividends + equity distributions (Annex 7 / tsd_L7_0). Scalar-only — caller supplies all c7xxx values. payable_income_tax (c7200_TasutavTm) rolls into header c110_Tm; equity_social_tax_corrected (c7050_OmakapSmKorrig) rolls into header c115_Sm. The full key→c-code map is in references/tsd-codes.md. Source data should come from transactions of type DIVIDEND_PAYMENT (registered by migration 382).

annex_7._comment_dividends_total: c7008_DivKokku — total dividends declared in the period

_comment_inf1: Optional. Annual companion form (INF1 / tsd_Inf1_0) — typically only filed in December alongside the year-end TSD. Captures one row per dividend recipient. recipients[] is a list; each recipient needs name (c13020_Nimi), distribution_type_code (c13050_VmValiKood — see references/tsd-codes.md: DK=dividend, TDK=tax-paid dividend, AOT=non-taxable distribution), and distribution_amount (c13060_VmSumma). Optional: estonian_registry_code OR foreign_registry_code, country_code, foreign_address, taxable_amount, exempt_amount, tax_rate, withheld_tax.
